edge_hypothesis: Time caps are the system's most promising untested universal improvement. On MACD, the time-cap hypothesis is that losers meander while winners move fast — a 6-8 bar cap on 1h kills slow-bleed losers while preserving explosive winners. This has ONLY been tested on macd_confirmation. The ema_rsi_atr template is the ideal second test subject because: (1) it showed PF=1.201 but CATASTROPHIC 69% DD, indicating the loss profile needs fixing, (2) its vol expansion gate (ATR > ATR_MA_20) already selects high-volatility entries — these entries SHOULD produce fast directional moves if the signal is valid, (3) 195 trades vs MACD's 161 provides a larger sample to validate time-cap universality. The specific hypothesis: ema_rsi_atr's 69% DD comes from trades where vol expands (ATR spikes) but price CHOPS rather than trends — the vol gate fires but the direction is wrong. These chop trades slowly bleed to the full 2.0x ATR stop over 10-20 bars. A time cap at 6-8 bars kills these chop trades at partial loss (exiting at market before hitting the full stop), which should: (a) reduce average loss size dramatically, (b) reduce DD from 69% toward 15-25%, (c) maintain or improve PF because genuine trend moves on ema_rsi_atr reach 7x ATR within 3-6 bars when vol is expanding. If PF improves from 1.201 AND DD drops below 20%, time discipline is confirmed as template-agnostic — and should be applied to ALL remaining templates (supertrend, rsi_pullback). Invalidation: if PF drops below 1.0 with time caps, ema_rsi_atr signals are fundamentally slower-developing than MACD — the EMA crossover momentum takes longer to translate into directional moves, making time caps counterproductive.

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_1h_timecap6_7to1
variants.description: EMA9/EMA21 crossover + RSI 35-75 + vol expansion gate on ETH/1h with 7:1 R:R and aggressive 6-bar time cap (6 hours). This is the direct comparison to MACD's 6-bar time cap variant (mc6t8b3k). If both templates improve with 6-bar caps, time discipline is universal. The vol expansion gate + time cap creates a 'volatility window' pattern: enter when vol expands, demand that the move develops within 6 hours, exit at market if it doesn't. Previous ema_rsi_atr on 1h produced PF=1.142 with 163 trades at ~4x R:R. At 7:1 R:R with time cap, expected: fewer full-stop losses (most losers exit at partial loss after 6 bars), similar winner count (real moves hit 14x ATR TP fast during vol expansion).
entry_long: EMA_9 > EMA_21 (short-term momentum above medium-term, bullish alignment).
RSI_14 between 35 and 75 (momentum sweet spot — not extended).
ATR_14 > 20-bar ATR MA (volatility expansion gate — vol is expanding).
entry_short: EMA_9 < EMA_21 (short-term below medium-term, bearish alignment).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (14.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Exit at market after 6 bars if neither TP nor SL has been hit (time-decay exit).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.0 with 6-bar cap, ema_rsi_atr signals need more than 6h to develop — try 8-bar and 10-bar variants
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 14.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Time exit after 6 bars at market price.

components.notes: EMA_9 / EMA_21 crossover — momentum alignment signal
RSI_14 band 35-75 — wide band, time cap handles noise instead of entry filtering
ATR_14 vol expansion gate + 2.0x stop / 14.0x TP — 7:1 R:R with 6-bar time cap

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_1h_timecap8_7to1
variants.description: Same as 6-bar variant but with 8-bar time cap (8 hours). The moderate time discipline variant. Comparison logic: if 6-bar PF > 8-bar PF, aggressive caps work better for ema_rsi_atr (noise trades die faster). If 8-bar PF > 6-bar PF, the EMA crossover signal needs 7-8 hours to develop momentum — slower than MACD's zero-cross which captures momentum inflection directly. This A/B test reveals the optimal time horizon for EMA-based momentum signals vs MACD-based momentum signals.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (14.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Exit at market after 8 bars if neither TP nor SL has been hit (time-decay exit).
Hypothesis failure mode: compare to 6-bar variant — if 8-bar > 6-bar, search toward 10-12 bar caps for ema_rsi_atr
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 14.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Time exit after 8 bars at market price.

components.notes: RSI_14 band 35-75 — same as 6-bar variant for clean A/B comparison
ATR_14 vol expansion gate + 2.0x stop / 14.0x TP — 7:1 R:R with 8-bar time cap

variants.name: ema_rsi_atr_4h_timecap5_9to1
variants.description: EMA9/EMA21 crossover + RSI 40-70 (tighter band) + vol expansion gate on ETH/4h with 9:1 R:R and 5-bar time cap (20 hours). The 4h + tight time cap variant. On 4h, 5 bars = 20 hours — roughly one trading day. The hypothesis: on 4h, vol expansion entries that don't produce a directional move within one full trading day are noise. The tighter RSI band (40-70) provides higher signal quality to compensate for fewer bars allowed. At 9:1 R:R, only genuine multi-day trend initiations reach the 18x ATR TP. Previous ema_rsi_atr on 4h showed PF=1.201 at ~4x R:R — scaling to 9:1 with time discipline should improve both PF and DD simultaneously.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (18.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Exit at market after 5 bars if neither TP nor SL has been hit (time-decay exit — one trading day on 4h).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < 1.0 at 5-bar cap on 4h, test 8-bar cap — 4h trends may need 32 hours to develop
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 18.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Time exit after 5 bars at market price.

components.notes: RSI_14 band 40-70 — tighter for higher quality at 4h timeframe
ATR_14 vol expansion gate + 2.0x stop / 18.0x TP — 9:1 R:R with 5-bar time cap (20 hours)
